REMOVED FROM JURY CALENDAR ON OCT-31-2003 IN DEPT. 504 AS ORDERED BY THE COURT; CONT.'D ON JURY TRIAL; WITS SWN/EXMN'D; DOC. EVID INTRDC'D. & MRK'D; JURY DELIBERATIONS COMMENCE; THE TWELVE JURORS DELIVER A GENERAL VERDICT TO THE COURT, TO WIT: "WE, THE JURY IN THE ABOVE-ENTITLED ACTION, FIND IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF SALAR BAKTASH AND AWARD DAMAGES IN THE SUM OF $4,804.00." THE COURT DISCHARGES ALL JURORS AND THE ONE ALTERNATE JUROR; ADMONITION IS LIFTED; PLAINTIFF COUNSEL MICHAEL IS ORDERED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT JUDGMENT FOR THE COURT'S SIGNATURE; ALL EXHIBITS IN THE CAUSE ARE ORDERED RETURNED ON THE RECORD AND ARE SO RETURNED TO RESPECTIVE COUNSEL BY THE CLERK. JUDGE: HON. OLLIE MARIE-VICTOIRE; REPORTER: LORETTA NAJERA, C.S.R. #5153; CLERK: MARJORIE L. MANZELLA (D-504, FRIDAY,31OCT2003).
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ON VERDICT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAKTASH, SALAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOTA, NICHOLAS M. $4,804.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,804.00
